name: Impossible Beef and Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups beef, cooked and cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
3. In the dish, layer beef, onion, celery, tomatoes, and cheese.
4. Beat the remaining ingredients together in a blender on high or with an electric mixer on high for 15 seconds or 1 minute until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture over the layers.
6. Bake until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40-50 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes.
7. Garnish with parsley sprigs if desired. Serves: 8-10.
High Altitude - Bake 70-75 minutes.
